revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿七]][[zh:七月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿七]][[zh:七月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿七]][[zh:七月廿七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿七]][[zh:七月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 27|qq=July 27}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunmei|en|Bunmei|qid=Q1193544|lt=Bunmei (era)|1=Bunmei}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} , {{ill|1471|en|1471|qid=Q6577|lt=1471|1=1471}} ) – {{ill|Rennyo|en|Rennyo|qid=Q323600|lt=Rennyo|1=Rennyo}} built the {{ill|Yoshizaki-gobō|en|Yoshizaki-gobō|qid=Q3572702|lt=Yoshizaki Gobo|1=Yoshizaki-gobō}} in Echizen. * Year 2 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} , {{ill|1533|en|1533|qid=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}} ) – {{ill|Satomi Yoshitoyo|ja|里見義豊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satomi Yoshitoyo|1=Satomi Yoshitoyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644666}} purged his uncle, {{ill|Satomi Sanetaka|ja|里見実堯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satomi Sanetaka|1=Satomi Sanetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644642}} , and regained control over the {{ill|Satomi clan|en|Satomi clan|qid=Q2975367|lt=Satomi clan|1=Satomi clan}} , beginning the {{ill|Tenbun Internal Conflict|ja|稲村の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun Internal Conflict|1=Inamura Incident|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11596643}} . * Year 5 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} , {{ill|1536|en|1536|qid=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}} ) – {{ill|Hokke-ikki|en|Hokke-ikki|qid=Q11555311|lt=Tenbun Hokke Disturbance|1=Hokke-ikki}} : Monks of {{ill|Enryaku-ji|en|Enryaku-ji|qid=Q917195|lt=Enryaku-ji|1=Enryaku-ji}} defeated the {{ill|Hokke sect|ja|法華宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokke sect|1=Hokke-shū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q44733349}} uprising in Kyoto and burned 21 temples. * Year 9 of {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna (era)|1=Genna}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 23|en|August 23|qid=Q2821|lt=August 23|1=August 23}} , {{ill|1623|en|1623|qid=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|qid=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} was appointed as the 3rd {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * Year 10 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} , {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} ) – {{ill|Kondō Jūzō|ja|近藤重蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kondō Jūzō|1=Kondō Jūzō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11638937}} and his team erected a sign reading "Great Japan Etorofu" at the northern tip of {{ill|Iturup|en|Iturup|qid=Q215727|lt=Iturup Island|1=Iturup}} . * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 11|en|September 11|qid=Q2851|lt=September 11|1=September 11}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Popular Affairs|ja|民部省 (明治時代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ministry of Popular Affairs|qq=}} was absorbed into the {{ill|Ministry of Finance (Japan)|ja|大蔵省|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ministry of Finance (Japan)|1=Ministry of the Treasury|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q910073}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}} , {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}} ) – {{ill|Inō Jakusui|ja|稲生若水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inō Jakusui|1=Inō Jakusui|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6561157}} , physician and {{ill|honzōgaku|ja|本草学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/honzōgaku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 本草学|1=Herbal medicine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q861699}} (d. {{ill|1715|en|1715|qid=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}} ). * Year 4 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 11|en|September 11|qid=Q2851|lt=September 11|1=September 11}} , {{ill|1719|en|1719|qid=Q6902|lt=1719|1=1719}} ) – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|qid=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu|1=Tanuma Okitsugu}} , senior {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1788|en|1788|qid=Q7765|lt=1788|1=1788}} ). * Year 5 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} , {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Sadanori|ja|松平定則|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Sadanori|1=Matsudaira Sadanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10729408}} , 10th lord of {{ill|Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|en|Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|qid=Q1042087|lt=Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|1=Iyo-Matsuyama Domain}} (d. {{ill|1809|en|1809|qid=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} ). * Year 8 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} , {{ill|1825|en|1825|qid=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}} ) – {{ill|Satake Yoshitaka|en|Satake Yoshitaka|qid=Q8514549|lt=Satake Yoshitaka|1=Satake Yoshitaka}} , lord of {{ill|Kubota Domain|en|Kubota Domain|qid=Q1067720|lt=Kubota Domain|1=Kubota Domain}} (d. {{ill|1884|en|1884|qid=Q7819|lt=1884|1=1884}} ). * Year 6 of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} ) – {{ill|Hashimoto Gahō|en|Hashimoto Gahō|qid=Q3128092|lt=Hashimoto Gahō|1=Hashimoto Gahō}} , {{ill|nihonga|ja|Japanese Painter|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/nihonga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} painter (d. {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Intercalary 7th month) (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 19|en|September 19|qid=Q2896|lt=September 19|1=September 19}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} ) – {{ill|Takahashi Korekiyo|en|Takahashi Korekiyo|qid=Q315842|lt=Takahashi Korekiyo|1=Takahashi Korekiyo}} , 20th {{ill|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|ja|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|1=Prime Minister of Japan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q274948}} (d. {{ill|1936|en|1936|qid=Q18649|lt=1936|1=1936}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 7 of {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} ) – {{ill|Shiranui Dakuemon|en|Shiranui Dakuemon|qid=Q7498275|lt=Shiranui Dakuemon|1=Shiranui Dakuemon}} , 8th {{ill|Yokozuna|ja|横綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yokozuna|qid=Q1067277}} sumo wrestler (b. {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|26|7|28|6|27|8|7|0727|qq=}}

[[ar:July 27 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿七]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿七]] {{wikidata link|Q839708}} [[Category:Days 27 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
